description: Work rhythm analysis from commit timestamps — peak hours, day patterns, sustainability signals

userStories.title: Hour-of-day histogram query
userStories.description: Add query fn `commit_hour_histogram(conn, from, to) -> [u32; 24]` in query.rs that counts commits per local hour. Returns array indexed 0–23 (local time). Only counts event_type='commit' rows.
acceptanceCriteria: Returns [u32; 24] array, each slot = commit count for that hour in local time
Timestamps stored as UTC are converted to local time before bucketing
Empty range returns all zeros
Only commit events counted (not branch_switch/merge)

userStories.title: Hour-of-day histogram display
userStories.description: Add `render_hour_histogram(histogram: &[u32; 24]) -> String` in output.rs. Renders ASCII bar chart with 24 rows (one per hour), bar scaled to terminal width, max-bar normalization. Shows peak hour highlighted.
acceptanceCriteria: Each hour 0–23 shown as a row: '  9 | ████████ 12'
Bar length proportional to commit count, normalized to max
Peak hour label: 'Peak: 10:00–11:00 (12 commits)'
Hours with 0 commits show empty bar
Returns empty message string if all zeros

userStories.title: Day-of-week pattern query
userStories.description: Add `commit_dow_histogram(conn, from, to) -> [u32; 7]` in query.rs. Counts commits per day-of-week in local time. Index 0=Monday…6=Sunday (ISO weekday).
acceptanceCriteria: Returns [u32; 7] array indexed Mon=0..Sun=6
UTC timestamps converted to local date before bucketing
Only commit events counted
Empty range returns all zeros

userStories.title: Day-of-week pattern display
userStories.description: Add `render_dow_histogram(histogram: &[u32; 7]) -> String` in output.rs. Renders 7-row ASCII bar chart with day-of-week labels.
acceptanceCriteria: Rows labeled Mon/Tue/Wed/Thu/Fri/Sat/Sun
Bar length proportional to commit count
Weekend rows (Sat/Sun) labeled with a marker (e.g. '[wknd]')
Returns empty message if all zeros

userStories.title: After-hours/weekend ratio query
userStories.description: Add `after_hours_ratio(conn, from, to) -> AfterHoursStats` in query.rs. Counts commits during after-hours (before 09:00 or after 18:00 local) and on weekends. Returns counts and ratios.
acceptanceCriteria: AfterHoursStats { total_commits: u32, after_hours_commits: u32, weekend_commits: u32, after_hours_ratio: f64, weekend_ratio: f64 }
After-hours = local hour < 9 OR local hour >= 18
Weekend = Saturday or Sunday in local time
Ratios are 0.0 when total_commits == 0
Only commit events counted

userStories.title: After-hours/weekend ratio display
userStories.description: Add rendering for AfterHoursStats in output.rs. Framed as sustainability signal, not a score. No judgment language.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows: 'After-hours: 3/20 commits (15%)'
Shows: 'Weekend:     2/20 commits (10%)'
No evaluative language ('bad', 'healthy', 'warning')
If ratio > 0.5 show neutral note: '(more than half outside core hours)'

userStories.title: Session length distribution query
userStories.description: Add `session_length_distribution(conn, from, to, session_gap_minutes, first_commit_minutes) -> SessionDistribution` in query.rs. Reuses estimate_time_v2 session detection logic to compute per-session durations across all repos.
acceptanceCriteria: SessionDistribution { sessions: Vec<Duration>, median_minutes: i64, p90_minutes: i64, mean_minutes: i64 }
Session boundaries defined by session_gap threshold (same as estimate_time_v2)
Sessions < 5 min excluded (likely noise from single commits)
Empty DB returns SessionDistribution with all zeros and empty vec
Aggregates across all repos in the time window

userStories.title: Session length distribution display
userStories.description: Add `render_session_distribution(dist: &SessionDistribution) -> String` in output.rs. Shows median, p90, mean session lengths. Framed as 'flow proxy'.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows: 'Session lengths (N sessions):  median ~45m  p90 ~2h 10m  mean ~1h 5m'
If 0 sessions: 'No sessions detected in this period'
No flow/quality scoring language

userStories.title: Burst vs steady commit pattern query
userStories.description: Add `burst_pattern(conn, from, to) -> BurstStats` in query.rs. Classifies commit pattern as burst (many commits in short windows) vs steady (evenly distributed). Use coefficient of variation of inter-commit gaps.
acceptanceCriteria: BurstStats { commit_count: u32, cv_of_gaps: f64, pattern: CommitPattern } where CommitPattern = Burst | Steady | Insufficient
CommitPattern::Insufficient when < 3 commits
CommitPattern::Burst when cv_of_gaps > 1.0
CommitPattern::Steady when cv_of_gaps <= 1.0
cv_of_gaps = std_dev(gaps) / mean(gaps); 0.0 if mean is 0

userStories.title: Burst vs steady display
userStories.description: Add rendering for BurstStats in output.rs. Descriptive only — 'bursty' and 'steady' are neutral pattern labels, not evaluations.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows: 'Commit pattern: bursty (CV=1.8)' or 'Commit pattern: steady (CV=0.4)'
Shows: 'Commit pattern: insufficient data (< 3 commits)' for Insufficient
No 'good'/'bad' language

userStories.title: CLI command: blackbox rhythm
userStories.description: Add `Rhythm` variant to Commands enum in cli.rs and dispatch in main.rs. Accepts `--days N` (default 30) and `--format pretty|json` flags. Queries all rhythm metrics for the past N days and renders them.
acceptanceCriteria: blackbox rhythm runs without error
blackbox rhythm --days 7 shows last 7 days
blackbox rhythm --format json emits valid JSON with all metrics
blackbox rhythm --days 0 shows error: 'days must be >= 1'
Default: 30 days
Exempt from config check? No — requires DB

userStories.title: Rhythm output module: render_rhythm
userStories.description: Add `RhythmReport` struct and `render_rhythm(report: &RhythmReport) -> String` in output.rs (or new rhythm_output.rs). Composes all rhythm sections: header, hour histogram, DOW histogram, after-hours, session distribution, burst pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: Header shows: '=== Work Rhythm (last 30 days) ==='
Sections separated by blank lines
Each section has a label: 'Hour of day', 'Day of week', 'Sustainability', 'Session lengths', 'Commit pattern'
render_rhythm_json(report) emits JSON with all metric fields

userStories.title: Integration test: hour histogram query
userStories.description: In tests/rhythm_test.rs, insert commits at known UTC timestamps, call commit_hour_histogram, assert correct per-bucket counts.
acceptanceCriteria: Insert 3 commits at 10:00 UTC, 2 at 15:00 UTC, assert [10]=3, [15]=2 (assuming UTC==local for test)
Empty DB returns [0;24]
Commits outside [from,to] not counted

userStories.title: Integration test: day-of-week histogram query
userStories.description: In tests/rhythm_test.rs, insert commits on known weekdays, assert correct DOW buckets.
acceptanceCriteria: Insert commits on a Wednesday and Saturday, assert [2] and [5] > 0, others 0
Empty DB returns [0;7]

userStories.title: Integration test: after-hours ratio
userStories.description: In tests/rhythm_test.rs, insert commits at after-hours and core-hours timestamps, assert AfterHoursStats ratios.
acceptanceCriteria: 3 core-hours commits, 1 after-hours: after_hours_ratio ~= 0.25
All weekend: weekend_ratio = 1.0
0 commits: ratios = 0.0

userStories.title: Integration test: session distribution
userStories.description: In tests/rhythm_test.rs, insert commits with known session gaps, assert median/p90 match expected.
acceptanceCriteria: Two sessions of 30m and 60m: median=45m
Single short session (< 5m): excluded, returns 0 sessions

userStories.title: Integration test: burst pattern
userStories.description: In tests/rhythm_test.rs, insert evenly-spaced commits and then burst commits, assert correct CommitPattern classification.
acceptanceCriteria: 12 commits uniformly 30m apart: CommitPattern::Steady
10 commits: 9 within 2 min then 1 after 300 min: CommitPattern::Burst
2 commits: CommitPattern::Insufficient

userStories.title: Integration test: CLI command blackbox rhythm
userStories.description: In tests/cli_test.rs or tests/rhythm_test.rs, use assert_cmd to verify `blackbox rhythm` exits 0 and produces non-empty output.
acceptanceCriteria: blackbox rhythm exits 0 with a populated DB
blackbox rhythm --format json exits 0, stdout is valid JSON
blackbox rhythm --days 0 exits non-zero with error message

userStories.title: Update README.md and AGENTS.md
userStories.description: Update project documentation to reflect new feature. README.md: add new command to Commands table if applicable, update feature descriptions. AGENTS.md: add new source files to Architecture tree, update Key Patterns if new patterns introduced.
acceptanceCriteria: README.md Commands table includes new command (if a CLI command was added)
README.md describes the new feature/capability
AGENTS.md Architecture src/ tree lists any new .rs files
AGENTS.md Key Dependencies updated if new crates added
userStories.notes: This must be the LAST story executed. Reference README.md and AGENTS.md in project root.
